title: Make Java multi-module fixture real
outOfScope: Production Java application behavior outside the fixture.
Provider credentials, hosted CI, identity, sandbox isolation, or release publishing.

sources.reason: Existing evidence boundary for real stack fixtures.
Existing fixture lifecycle and evidence assertions.
Authorized remediation sequence and acceptance intent.

riskAssessment.reason: Constrained local fixture; unavailable Maven is recorded as not_run and never represented as executed evidence.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the serial remediation plan; implementation and verification are locally executable.

preReviewWarnings: Review that Java execution evidence is real, while unavailable Maven/provider capabilities remain explicitly not_run.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The fixture has two Java modules with real source paths and a root pom.xml.
The lifecycle runs install, build, test, quality, upgrade, rollback, and release-check evidence without writing simulated execution records.
Ambiguous Request and Critical Domain Change are blocked with explicit resume conditions.
Unavailable Maven/provider capabilities are recorded as not_run.
Python tests validate the fixture output and evidence boundary.
guidelines: Keep fixture evidence local and distinguish executed commands from not_run capabilities.
Do not claim provider, identity, sandbox, or production guarantees from local fixture execution.

intent.problem: The Java multi-module fixture currently only describes a stack in a manifest, so review cannot distinguish real module execution from harness simulation.
constraints: Keep the fixture dependency-light and runnable without Maven when the Maven toolchain is unavailable.
intent.rationale: A small core/app project plus a lifecycle script provides reviewable source, compile, test, quality, upgrade, rollback, and release evidence.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the serial remediation plan and full Work Item lifecycle.

rawUserRequest: 继续，循环到所有任务全部完成，中途不要停。

declaredIntent.summary: Exercise real Java multi-module execution and preserve explicit local evidence boundaries.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
